text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through town on a day off, when I
happen to hear a cheerful voice calling out from a
Chinese restaurant down the road.

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
Come on in, folks! Our grand eating contest is
finally about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text: Our hungry contestants are once again drooling at the prospect of seizing the throne today!

text_block_list.name: Chinese Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
Introducing our three-time undefeated champion,
the Stomach Bulldozer of Hokkaido, Special
Week!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
HAHAHA! That's me, the Bulldozer! I love mapo
rice bowls! OH YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! Trainer, what are you doing here?!
choice_data_list:
When did you become a reigning champion
here?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Th-this isn't what it looks like! This just sort of...
happened!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They were, uh, having an eating contest when I
passed by here a while back...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I got curious, so I signed up and ended up
winning... And I've sort of been defending my title
ever since...
choice_data_list:
This isn't exactly fit for an athlete's diet, you
know.

This isn't exactly fit for an athlete's diet, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I-I know! But... I'm the reigning champion! I can't
let people down!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: C'mon, champion! Show us your stuff today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Okay! Um.. Hahahahaha! It's chow time!
YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-well, no, actually the restaurant owner asked
me to come up with a fun persona, so...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Please, Trainer! Just let me participate in this one
last time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'll step down as champion after today, promise!
choice_data_list: ...Then you'd better go out with a bang.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, fans and foodies! I know this is sudden,
but after today's contest, I will be stepping down
as champion!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: What?! Is she yankin' our chains here?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The champion just spoke normally!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Which is why today, I'm going to eat like there's
no tomorrow and leave no room for regrets!
YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week wins the contest in spectacular
fashion, then steps down from her position, thus
preserving her title as undefeated champion.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Got it! I'll do my best to only eat an
appropriately-sized portion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week does her best while reining in her
appetite, but with the other participants digging
in with such gusto...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I lost...
choice_data_list: I guess you really did curb your appetite...
I guess you really did curb your appetite...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, it's better this way, actually. I knew I
couldn't keep doing this, but I didn't feel like I
could stop either...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Besides, my goal is to become the best racer in all
of Japan, not the biggest eater! Let's get back to
training! OH YEEEAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might not have the title of champion
anymore, but it doesn't look like her high-energy
alter ego is going anywhere just yet.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's wrong, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? Why are you talking like that?
choice_data_list:
Show us your what your stomach's made of,
champion! YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay! YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hahahahaha! I-I'm the Stomach Bulldozer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her pseudonym, Special Week bulldozes
through every dish put in front of her, and claims
victory as the champion once more.
